characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, long dark wavy hair. She has a clear face with minimal makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Bright pink zip-up hoodie over a white top. Gold rings on her fingers.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Guys, guess what? Mere stylist ne abhi mujhe bola ki meri English perfect hai! [Guys, guess what? My stylist just told me my English is perfect!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable success moment.
- Establishes the core desire: being complimented on English fluency.
- Sets a casual, vlog-style tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: When the stylist compliments your English 😭

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Could you try this new style for me today? [Could you try this new style for me today?]
Unknown speaker says: Bilkul ma'am. Waise aapki English bahut achhi hai. [Absolutely ma'am. By the way, your English is very good.]
Character A says: Sach mein? I've been practicing. [Really? I've been practicing.]
Unknown speaker says: Haan, ekdum fluent lag rahi hai. [Yes, it sounds completely fluent.]
Character A says: Thank you! Main actually Supernova app use kar rahi hoon practice ke liye. Isme AI tutor ke saath real-life conversations practice kar sakte hain. [Thank you! I'm actually using the Supernova app to practice. You can practice real-life conversations with an AI tutor on it.]
Unknown speaker says: Achha? Mujhe bhi apni English improve karni hai. [Really? I need to improve my English too.]
Character A says: Aapko definitely Supernova try karna chahiye. Bahut help milti hai. [You should definitely try Supernova. It helps a lot.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's real-world impact in a natural setting.
- Introduces Supernova as the solution for spoken English practice.
- Highlights the AI tutor feature without disparaging competitors.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Could you try this new style for me today?
Absolutely ma'am. By the way, your English is very good.
Really? I've been practicing.
Yes, it sounds completely fluent.
Thank you!
I'm actually using the Supernova app to practice.
You can practice real-life conversations with an AI tutor on it.
Really? I need to improve my English too.
You should definitely try Supernova. It helps a lot.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Sach bataun toh pehle main English bolne mein freeze ho jaati thi. [To be honest, I used to freeze up when speaking English.] But now I don't. Supernova ke daily lessons aur AI practice ne mera confidence itna badha diya hai. [Supernova's daily lessons and AI practice have boosted my confidence so much.] Ab embarrassment ka koi darr nahi! [No more fear of embarrassment!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Connects emotionally with the user's fear of freezing up.
- Reinforces the payoff: confidence and no more embarrassment.
- Acts as a strong testimonial lead-in to the CTA.

- Delivers the final Call to Action.
- Displays the Supernova brand clearly.
- Encourages immediate app download.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Download the app and start speaking today.
